title: Longfellow's Birthday
body: Henry Wadsworth Longfellow was born on February 27, 1807. His poetry became part of the American schoolbook memory for generations, which is impressive for someone who never had to deal with a family group text.
notes: Focused birthday-date fact from user's example; verify exact source/date during later data hardening.

title: John Steinbeck's Birthday
body: John Steinbeck was born on February 27, 1902. He became one of America's best-known novelists, proving that a birthday can share the calendar with some serious literary company.
notes: Focused birthday-date fact from user's example; verify exact source/date during later data hardening.

title: Elizabeth Taylor's Birthday
body: Elizabeth Taylor was born on February 27, 1932. She became one of Hollywood's most recognizable stars, with the kind of screen presence that made old movies feel glamorous even before color television did half the work.
notes: Focused birthday-date fact from user's example; verify exact source/date during later data hardening.

title: Josh Groban's Birthday
body: Josh Groban was born on February 27, 1981. His voice gave the calendar one more musical reason to remember the day, especially for anyone who enjoys a dramatic note held longer than expected.

title: Booker T. Washington's Birthday
body: Booker T. Washington was born on April 5, 1856. He became an influential educator and author, giving this date a serious historical note before the birthday cake even enters the room.
notes: Focused birthday-date fact from user's example; verify exact source/date during later data hardening.

title: Pocahontas and John Rolfe Marry
body: Pocahontas married John Rolfe in Virginia on April 5, 1614. It is one of the better-known early colonial stories, even though the real history is more complicated than the simple versions many people first learned.
notes: Focused birthday-date fact from user's example; verify exact source/date during later data hardening.

title: Stephen King's Carrie Is Published
body: Stephen King's first novel, Carrie, was published in April 1974. It helped launch one of the most successful writing careers in modern fiction and made high school seem even more terrifying than it already was.
notes: Focused birthday-date fact from user's example; exact date should be hardened later.

title: The Crocodile Hunter Debuts
body: The Crocodile Hunter debuted in the 1990s and made Steve Irwin's enthusiasm impossible to miss. It brought wildlife television a burst of energy, khaki, and the sense that every animal deserved both respect and excitement.
notes: Focused birthday-date fact from user's example; exact date should be hardened later.

title: Ulysses S. Grant's Birthday
body: Ulysses S. Grant was born on April 27, 1822. He became a Union general and later the 18th president of the United States, giving this date some serious presidential weight before the family birthday gets top billing.
notes: Focused birthday-date fact from user's example; verify exact source/date during later data hardening.

title: Coretta Scott King's Birthday
body: Coretta Scott King was born on April 27, 1927. She became a major civil rights figure in her own right and helped carry forward a legacy of public service and remembrance.
notes: Focused birthday-date fact from user's example; verify exact source/date during later data hardening.

title: Casey Kasem's Birthday
body: Casey Kasem was born on April 27, 1932. As the voice of American Top 40, he turned counting down songs into something that felt like a weekly appointment.
notes: Focused birthday-date fact from user's example; verify exact source/date during later data hardening.

title: The First YouTube Video
body: The first YouTube video was uploaded in April 2005. It was short, casual, and not exactly glamorous, which somehow makes it a perfect start for the platform.
notes: Focused for April 27 birthday context but actual upload was April 23, so keep as nearby rather than exact.
